sheet_name: แปลนหลังคา
view_title: แปลนหลังคา
grid_source: mk_test/t2/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json

element.grid_ref: covers grid1-3 x gridA-D plus overhangs
element.description: หลังคาเหล็กรีดลอน (corrugated metal sheet roofing) shown with hatching over the whole plan; two SLOPE arrows (labeled '6' i.e. approx. 6-degree pitch, hand-annotated, hard to confirm exact degree symbol) indicating fall direction on the two roof faces.

warnings: This is the roof-plan half of sheet A-04; the floor-plan half is in sibling file _หน้า06_floor_plan.json.
The roof slope figure ('SLOPE 6', likely 6 degrees) is small hand-style text and should be zoom-verified.

Actual roof framing (purlins, rafters/trusses) is not detailed on this sheet — it references 'โครงหลังคา ดูแบบวิศวกรรมโครงสร้าง' (see structural engineering drawing), consistent with the S-01~S-08 sheets listed in the สารบัญ (pages 16-23) which are outside this extraction's page range.
